Title: AI-First Mobile Development: Live Coding with Copilot and .NET MAUI
Author: dotnet
Description:
Can AI build an entire .NET MAUI app from scratch? The .NET MAUI team is going to find out — live.

Join Jakub Florkowski, Shane Neuville, and Gerald Versluis as they attempt to build a .NET MAUI app using nothing but AI.

From scaffolding to UI, from bug fixes to code review — every step powered by AI agents. They'll build it, validate it, review it, and ship it, all without writing code manually.

Watch the team navigate the realities of AI-assisted development in real time: what works, what breaks, and how to get the best results when you let AI take the wheel on a real cross-platform app.

Whether you're curious about AI-powered development or want to see how the people who build .NET MAUI actually use it, this one's for you.

🔗 .NET MAUI: https://github.com/dotnet/maui 📄 Docs: https://learn.microsoft.com/dotnet/maui

🎙️ Featuring: Jakub Florkowski (@FlorkowskiJakub), Shane Neuville (@PureWeen), Gerald Versluis (@jfversluis)

#dotNETMAUI #AI #LiveCoding #dotNET #GitHubCopilot
